title: Villager Breeder
description: An automated villager breeding station. Two willing villagers breed when they have enough food (12 bread, 12 carrots, 12 potatoes, or 12 beetroot each). A bed for each villager and one extra for the baby is required. Villagers throw food to each other through a 1-block gap. A dispenser drops bread into the pen automatically on a timer. Babies are funneled out through a minecart or water stream for use in trading halls or as cured zombie villagers.
